homepage.heroSubhead: The continent's institutions are being rebuilt. The holding companies, the property firms, the logistics networks — all of it, from the ground up. This is where that work begins.
homepage.heroMeta: NJOH GROUP PLC · EST. 2021 · YAOUNDÉ · SÃO PAULO · MADRID
homepage.thesisQuote: Africa is not an emerging market. It is the market that will define the next fifty years — and it will need new kinds of institutions to build it.
homepage.sectorsSubhead: Four sectors. One thesis: the infrastructure Africa needs, built for the era Africa is entering.
homepage.sectorsEmerging: Emerging focus areas: media, technology, healthcare.
homepage.founderQuote: The question is not whether Africa will industrialise. It is whether the institutions that lead that process will be built by Africans, for Africans. That is the work we have chosen.
homepage.founderBio: Njih Njoh Keka founded Njoh Group in 2021, operating between Cameroon, Brazil and Spain. His work sits at the intersection of diaspora capital, industrial strategy, and AI.
homepage.footprintHeading: Rooted in Africa. Connected to the world.
homepage.insightsSubhead: Essays, theses, and perspectives from the Njoh Group team on the future of African industry.
homepage.insightsComingSoon: Our inaugural essays are being written.
